prompt: Quick sanity check: can I have two `Application-Start` feature sets in one app?
actual: No, you cannot have two `Application-Start` feature sets in one ARO application. The `Application-Start` feature set is a special feature set that runs once when the application starts. It is used to initialize the application and set up any required services or state. Only one `Application-Start` feature set is allowed per application.
model_raw:

No, you cannot have two `Application-Start` feature sets in one ARO application. The `Application-Start` feature set is a special feature set that runs once when the application starts. It is used to initialize the application and set up any required services or state. Only one `Application-Start` feature set is allowed per application.
expected: No. Exactly one `Application-Start` per application — the compiler errors out on zero or more than one.
